sections.heading: Overview
sections.content: The cortex CLI is implemented via Click (`cortex/cli.py`). All commands take `PROJECT_ROOT` as a positional argument (path to the project directory). The CLI is a thin wrapper — all logic lives in `cortex/index/` modules.

sections.heading: Command Reference
sections.content:
### cortex init <PROJECT_ROOT>
Initialise (or re-initialise) the Cortex index. Creates `.cortex/cortex.db`, runs a full scan, and establishes `code_hash`/`desc_hash` baselines for every node. If the database already exists, prompts for confirmation before wiping and rebuilding. ADR-009: re-init required to get new schema (`staleness` column on `nodes`, `desc_hash_at` on `node_verification`).

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--id <prefix>` | Custom project ID prefix | Directory name |

### cortex build <PROJECT_ROOT>
Scan project and add newly-discovered nodes/edges. Always runs in discovery-only mode: only new nodes are inserted, existing ones are untouched (staleness signals preserved). Edges are always updated. After scanning, runs the shared staleness engine to persist the `staleness` column. To reset all baselines, use `cortex init` instead.

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--id <prefix>` | Custom project ID prefix | Directory name |

### cortex render <PROJECT_ROOT>
Render indexed nodes at a specified detail level.

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--level <0\|1\|2\|steps>` | Detail level (required) | — |
| `--id <node_id>` | Render a single node | All nodes |
| `--type <node_type>` | Filter by node type | All types |

### cortex list <PROJECT_ROOT>
List nodes with optional filters.

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--type <node_type>` | Filter by node type | All |
| `--tag <tag>` | Filter by tag | All |

### cortex graph <NODE_ID> <PROJECT_ROOT>
Show the edge graph for a node.

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--direction <in\|out\|both>` | Traversal direction | `out` |
| `--depth N` | Number of hops | `1` |

### cortex check <PROJECT_ROOT>
Report per-node staleness/confidence status. Runs the shared staleness engine, writes results to the `staleness` column, and returns a summary.

Statuses emitted (ADR-009 unified vocabulary):
- **CONTENT_STALE** — own content changed (code_hash differs). Replaces old `CODE_STALE`. Promotable via `mark-clean`.
- **DESC_STALE** — descriptor/heading changed (desc_hash differs). Promotable via `mark-clean`.
- **LINKED_STALE** — linked node changed via `documents` or `validates` edge. Replaces old `CONTENT_STALE` (doc sections) and `COVERAGE_STALE` (tests). Must update the prose/test — cannot be marked clean.
- **STRUCTURAL_DRIFT** — function or file no longer found in source. Cannot be marked clean.
- **VERIFIED** — explicitly confirmed; requires both `code_hash_at` and `desc_hash_at` to match.
- **CLEAN** — in sync, no known drift.

Summary format: `{N} CONTENT_STALE · {N} DESC_STALE · {N} LINKED_STALE · {N} STRUCTURAL_DRIFT · {N} VERIFIED · {N} CLEAN`

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--all` | Show all nodes (including CLEAN) | Problems only |
| `--fail-on <none\|stale\|any>` | Exit 1 if matching problems exist. `stale` includes CONTENT_STALE, DESC_STALE, LINKED_STALE, STRUCTURAL_DRIFT. `any` includes all non-CLEAN/non-VERIFIED. | `none` |
| `--format <text\|json>` | Output format | `text` |

### cortex mark-clean <NODE_ID> <PROJECT_ROOT>
Mark a node as manually verified. Only applicable to CONTENT_STALE and DESC_STALE nodes — LINKED_STALE and STRUCTURAL_DRIFT must be resolved by updating the linked prose/test or rebuilding.

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--reason TEXT` | Why the docs are still accurate | Empty |

### cortex link <FROM_NODE_ID> <PROJECT_ROOT>
Add a typed edge between two nodes.

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--edge-type <type>` | Edge type from ontology (required) | — |
| `--to <NODE_ID>` | Target node ID (required) | — |

### cortex history checkpoint <PROJECT_ROOT>
Collapse old history rows into a checkpoint.

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--keep N` | Rows to retain per node | `10` |
| `--node-types TYPES` | Comma-separated node types | `atomic_process,composite_process` |
| `--older-than N` | Only collapse entries older than N days | `90` |
| `--no-prune` | Insert checkpoint row but don't delete | Off |

### cortex history agent-verified <PROJECT_ROOT>
List nodes with AGENT_VERIFIED status pending human review. No flags.

### cortex test <PROJECT_ROOT> [PYTEST_ARGS...]
Run pytest and record results in cortex.db.

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--node <id>` | Scope to tests validating this node | All tests |
| `--path <prefix>` | Scope to tests covering nodes under this path | All tests |
| `--no-save` | Don't write results to DB | Save |
| `--runner <cmd>` | Override runner command | Auto-detect |

### cortex viz <PROJECT_ROOT>
Launch the visualization dashboard.

| Flag | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `--port N` | Port to listen on | `8080` |
| `--no-browser` | Don't auto-open browser | Open |

### cortex export <PROJECT_ROOT>
Export full index to `.cortex/index.json`. No flags.

sections.heading: Exit Codes
sections.content:
- **0** — Success
- **1** — `cortex check --fail-on` condition met (stale/unverified nodes exist)
- **1** — `cortex test` exits with the pytest return code
- **Non-zero** — Any unhandled error (missing DB, invalid arguments, etc.)
